name: 16p12_2_SD_blocks
description: 16p12.2 SD blocks (Bailey 2002 catalog) lying proximal to the 16p12.1 recurrent CNV. Contain LCR16a-derived duplicons and OTOA pseudogene paralogs. Mediate rare ~3 Mb 16p12.2-p11.2 deletions and recurrent 520 kb 16p12.2 deletions distinct from 16p12.1.

architecture.internal_structure: Two SD modules of ~80-150 kb at ~97% identity composed of LCR16a duplicons and OTOA paralog (OTOA/OTOAP1 ~99.5%); flanks UQCRC2-EEF2K interval.
